title: Advanced Dynamic Programming and State Compression · Trace Retrieval
summary: Scale sequence alignment and constrained-selection models beyond naive tables. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for an optimized DP with equivalence evidence after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Model longest-common-subsequence and edit-distance choices with boundary rows and reconstruction.
Distinguish zero-one, unbounded, subset-sum, and value-indexed knapsack states.
Compress DP rows only when overwritten states are no longer needed.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
